name: Mickey's Lasagna
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the lasagna noodles according to package instructions until al dente.
2. Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C).
3. Layer cooked noodles, mozzarella cheese, and other ingredients in a baking dish.
4. Bake for 25-30 minutes or until heated through and cheese is melted and bubbly.
5. Turn off the oven when ready.
